task_1.description: Exploring urban legends, mysterious stories, and the difference between truth and imagination.

task_2.description: Dreams, goals, and ambitions that inspire people to achieve success and shape their future.

task_3.description: Stories from the past that blur truth and fiction, often mysterious and passed through generations.

task_4.description: Mythical beings appearing in folklore worldwide, inspiring stories, fear, and fascination across cultures.

task_5.description: A look at common professions, workplace roles, responsibilities, and necessary skills in daily life.

task_6.description: Exploring careers across different countries, their duties, qualifications, and cultural workplace practices.

task_7.description: How modern technology shapes life, enables progress, and creates opportunities for innovation worldwide.

task_8.description: Understanding climate change, pollution, natural resource management, and actions to protect our planet.

task_9.description: The importance of nutrition, exercise, mental health, and habits for a balanced, healthy life.

task_10.description: Exploring destinations, cultural experiences, and the impact of tourism on local communities.

task_11.description: The influence of newspapers, social media, television, and online platforms on society.

task_12.description: Predictions, innovations, robots, and the digital world shaping tomorrow’s society and careers.

task_13.description: Daily routines, learning methods, friendships, and challenges students face at school.

task_14.description: Discovering marine life, ocean ecosystems, and human exploration of the world’s seas.

task_15.description: Different cultures’ festivals, traditions, customs, and the ways people celebrate globally.

task_16.description: Lives, achievements, and influences of notable figures throughout history and modern society.

task_17.description: Analyzing historical stories, myths, and distinguishing between facts and fiction.

task_18.description: Exploring careers, workplaces, responsibilities, skills, salaries, and employment opportunities.

task_19.description: Entrepreneurship, profits, management strategies, risks, and factors leading to successful businesses.

task_20.description: Global changes, environmental issues, technology’s impact, and sustainable solutions for the future.

task_21.description: Art, music, writing, fashion, and online platforms as ways for personal expression.

task_22.description: Planning careers, choosing professions, gaining qualifications, skills, experience, and achieving goals.

task_23.description: From production to recycling, exploring the lifecycle of clothing and sustainable fashion practices.

task_24.description: National and cultural clothing, ceremonies, heritage, materials, patterns, and global fashion diversity.
